page_count.value: 22 total defense slides. No backup deck, no appendix, no extra slides after Q&A.

audience.value: Mixed computer science and engineering MSc thesis defense committee at Cyprus International University.

content_divergence.value: Use the locked Spoken Main Slide Plan in pptx.md as the structure. Build one complete 22-slide defense talk. Keep all facts and numbers sourced from the submitted thesis and final artifacts. Rewrite visible slide wording into concise Ahmed-style defense claims. Do not copy internal planning words into audience-facing slides.

image_notes.value: Use provided thesis figures and methodology assets as the evidence base. No decorative AI images for this deck. Integrate v6/v7/v8/F1/source-aware caveats only where they fit the 22-slide story; do not create any backup appendix.

candidates.name: CIU clean academic
candidates.note: White field, deep academic blue, restrained teal and amber accents for runtime evidence.

candidates.name: Research editorial light
candidates.note: Warmer off-white paper feel with navy text and muted evidence colors.

candidates.name: Engineering blue line
candidates.note: Very light technical field with stronger schematic blue and crisp dividers.

candidates.name: Strict sans academic
candidates.note: Single-family Swiss discipline; strong weight contrast, clean on projector.
candidates.sample_body: The selector closes most of the runtime gap while keeping the main limitation visible.
candidates.sample_body_latin: The selector closes most of the runtime gap while keeping the main limitation visible.

candidates.name: Academic serif contrast
candidates.note: More thesis-like: serif title with clean sans body, still formal.
candidates.sample_heading: Accuracy alone does not explain the value
candidates.sample_heading_latin: Accuracy alone does not explain the value
candidates.sample_body: Runtime-sensitive metrics show why the model is useful despite imperfect labels.
candidates.sample_body_latin: Runtime-sensitive metrics show why the model is useful despite imperfect labels.

candidates.name: Technical sans + mono
candidates.note: Clean engineering tone with monospace reserved for formulas and labels.
candidates.sample_heading: The labels come from measured runtime
candidates.sample_heading_latin: The labels come from measured runtime
candidates.sample_body: SBS, VBS, regret, and gap closed define the practical value of each decision.
candidates.sample_body_latin: SBS, VBS, regret, and gap closed define the practical value of each decision.

candidates.name: Provided evidence only
candidates.visual: Use thesis figures, diagrams, and charts only.

candidates.name: Formula-only rendered assets
candidates.visual: Only render LaTeX formulas as transparent PNG assets.
candidates.color: Black/blue formula ink on transparent background.

candidates.name: Sparse schematic accents
candidates.visual: If later needed, add tiny schematic arrows/lines, not illustrations.
